info.title: My Numbers
info.description: Bandwidth's My Numbers API - Read-only inventory and reporting endpoints for phone numbers in your account.

get.description:
Retrieves a list of in-service phone numbers associated with the account ID.

In this table are presented capabilities that are not universally available. The following request query parameters are only allowed for numbers from specific region/country:
| Number Region | Request Query Parameter |
|:--------------|:------------------------|
|NANP|city|
|NANP|tier|
|NANP|npaNxx|
|NANP|npaNxxx|
|NANP|lata|
|NANP|state|
|NANP|ratecenter|

When the  query parameters listed in the table above are passed, only in service North American Numbering Plan phone numbers are returned.

parameters.description:
The 6-digit prefix associated with the TN.

  • Allowed number ranges for NPA are [2-9] for the first digit and [0-9] for both the second and third digits.
  • Allowed number ranges for NXX are [2-9] for the first digit and [0-9] for both the second and third digits.
parameters.name: npaNxx

parameters.description:
The 7-digit prefix associated with the TN.

  • Allowed number ranges for NPA are [2-9] for the first digit and [0-9] for both the second and third digits.
  • Allowed number ranges for NXXX are [2-9] for the first digit and [0-9] the rest of the (X) digits.
parameters.name: npaNxxx

parameters.description: A Rate Center search filter - all returned TNs will be in the entered Rate Center.  Typically this is a 3 or 5 digit value.
parameters.name: lata

parameters.description: A State search filter - all returned TNs will be in the entered State.  This is a 2-character State or Province abbreviation.
parameters.name: state

parameters.description: A Rate Center search filter - all returned TNs will be in the entered Rate Center.  This `ratecenter` must be combined with a `state` in the query.  If State is not included in the query then the query will fail.
parameters.name: ratecenter

example.value:
<?xml version="1.0" encoding="UTF-8" standalone="yes"?>
<TNs>
   <TotalCount>59</TotalCount>
   <Links>
      <first>( a link goes here )</first>
      <next>( a link goes here )</next>
   </Links>
   <TelephoneNumbers>
      <Count>15</Count>
      <TelephoneNumber>+18043024183</TelephoneNumber>
      <TelephoneNumber>+18042121778</TelephoneNumber>
      <TelephoneNumber>+18042146066</TelephoneNumber>
      <TelephoneNumber>+18043814903</TelephoneNumber>
      <TelephoneNumber>+18043814905</TelephoneNumber>
      <TelephoneNumber>+18043814864</TelephoneNumber>
      <TelephoneNumber>+18043326094</TelephoneNumber>
      <TelephoneNumber>+18042121771</TelephoneNumber>
      <TelephoneNumber>+18043024182</TelephoneNumber>
      <TelephoneNumber>+18043814900</TelephoneNumber>
      <TelephoneNumber>+18047672642</TelephoneNumber>
      <TelephoneNumber>+18043024368</TelephoneNumber>
      <TelephoneNumber>+18042147950</TelephoneNumber>
      <TelephoneNumber>+18043169931</TelephoneNumber>
      <TelephoneNumber>+18043325302</TelephoneNumber>
   </TelephoneNumbers>
</TNs>

get.description: Returns the total number of in-service numbers for the given account.

example.value:
<?xml version="1.0" encoding="UTF-8" standalone="yes"?>
<Quantity>
	    <Count>62</Count>
</Quantity>

example.description: The requested resource was not found.

get.description: Check if a given phone number is in service. Returns a 200 OK with no body if the number is in-service on the account, and a 404 Not Found if the number is not in-service on the account.

parameters.description: The telephone number to check
parameters.name: tn

get.description: Retrieves a list of disconnected numbers associated with the account. There are optional search parameters to limit the discNumbers payload

example.value:
<?xml version="1.0" encoding="UTF-8" standalone="yes"?>
<TNs>
  <TotalCount>2</TotalCount>
  <TelephoneNumbers>
    <Count>2</Count>
    <TelephoneNumber>+14158714245</TelephoneNumber>
    <TelephoneNumber>+14352154439</TelephoneNumber>
  </TelephoneNumbers>
</TNs>

example.description: The requested resource was not found.

get.description: Retrieves a total number of disconnects.

example.value:
<?xml version="1.0" encoding="UTF-8" standalone="yes"?>
<Quantity>
  <Count>4</Count>
</Quantity>

example.description: The requested resource was not found.

get.description:
Retrieves all the telephone numbers currently in-service for the given Site.

In this table are presented capabilities that are not universally available. The following request query parameters are only allowed for numbers from specific region/country:
| Number Region | Request Query Parameter |
|:--------------|:------------------------|
|NANP|city|
|NANP|tier|
|NANP|npaNxx|
|NANP|npaNxxx|
|NANP|lata|
|NANP|state|
|NANP|ratecenter|

When the  query parameters listed in the table above are passed, only in service North American Numbering Plan phone numbers are returned.

parameters.description:
The 6-digit prefix associated with the TN.

  • Allowed number ranges for NPA are [2-9] for the first digit and [0-9] for both the second and third digits.
  • Allowed number ranges for NXX are [2-9] for the first digit and [0-9] for both the second and third digits.
parameters.name: npaNxx

parameters.description:
The 7-digit prefix associated with the TN.

  • Allowed number ranges for NPA are [2-9] for the first digit and [0-9] for both the second and third digits.
  • Allowed number ranges for NXXX are [2-9] for the first digit and [0-9] the rest of the (X) digits.
parameters.name: npaNxxx

parameters.description: A Rate Center search filter - all returned TNs will be in the entered Rate Center.  Typically this is a 3 or 5 digit value.
parameters.name: lata

parameters.description: A Rate Center search filter - all returned TNs will be in the entered Rate Center.  This `ratecenter` must be combined with a `state` in the query.  If State is not included in the query then the query will fail.
parameters.name: rateCenter

parameters.description: A State search filter - all returned TNs will be in the entered State.  This is a 2-character State or Province abbreviation.
parameters.name: state

example.value:
<?xml version="1.0" encoding="UTF-8" standalone="yes"?>
<TNs>
   <TotalCount>54</TotalCount>
   <Links>
      <first>
         <!-- SNIP -->
      </first>
      <next>
         <!-- SNIP -->
      </next>
   </Links>
   <TelephoneNumbers>
      <Count>3</Count>
      <TelephoneNumber>+14352154855</TelephoneNumber>
      <!-- SNIP -->
      <TelephoneNumber>+14352161523</TelephoneNumber>
   </TelephoneNumbers>
</TNs>

example.description: The requested resource was not found.

get.description: Retrieves Site telephone numbers total count

parameters.description: ID of the Site to retrieve count of TNs
parameters.name: siteId

example.value:
<?xml version="1.0" encoding="UTF-8" standalone="yes"?>
<SiteTNsResponse>
   <SiteTNs>
      <TotalCount>26</TotalCount>
   </SiteTNs>
</SiteTNsResponse>

example.description: The requested resource was not found.

get.description: Retrieve information about a Telephone number or set of Telephone numbers

parameters.description: ID of the Sip Peer to retrieve TNs information
parameters.name: sippeerId

parameters.description: If the value is false SipPeerTelephoneNumber will contain FullNumber tags only. This makes processing faster
parameters.name: includeAttributes

example.value:
<?xml version="1.0" encoding="UTF-8" standalone="yes"?>
<SipPeerTelephoneNumbersResponse>
   <Links>
      <first>( a link goes here )</first>
      <next>( a link goes here )</next>
   </Links>
   <SipPeerTelephoneNumbers>
      <SipPeerTelephoneNumber>
         <FullNumber>+12052160148</FullNumber>
         <CallingNameDisplay>true</CallingNameDisplay>
         <TnAttributes>
            <TnAttribute>Protected</TnAttribute>
            <TnAttribute>External</TnAttribute>
            <TnAttribute>Imported</TnAttribute>
         </TnAttributes>
         <MessagingSettings>
            <SmsEnabled>true</SmsEnabled>
         </MessagingSettings>
      </SipPeerTelephoneNumber>
      <SipPeerTelephoneNumber>
         <FullNumber>+12053161118</FullNumber>
         <CallingNameDisplay>false</CallingNameDisplay>
         <MessagingSettings>
            <SmsEnabled>true</SmsEnabled>
         </MessagingSettings>
      </SipPeerTelephoneNumber>
      <SipPeerTelephoneNumber>
         <FullNumber>+12053160118</FullNumber>
         <CallForward>+12014563025</CallForward>
         <CallingNameDisplay>false</CallingNameDisplay>
      </SipPeerTelephoneNumber>
   </SipPeerTelephoneNumbers>
</SipPeerTelephoneNumbersResponse>

example.description: The requested resource was not found.

get.description: Retrieve information about telephone number on Sip Peer.

parameters.description: ID of the Sip Peer to retrieve TN information
parameters.name: sippeerId

parameters.description: A E.164 Telephone Number
parameters.name: tn

example.value:
<?xml version="1.0" encoding="UTF-8" standalone="yes"?>
<SipPeerTelephoneNumberResponse>
    <SipPeerTelephoneNumber>
        <FullNumber>+15209072451</FullNumber>
        <CallForward>+17042661720</CallForward>
        <CallingNameDisplay>true</CallingNameDisplay>
        <TnAttributes>
            <TnAttribute>Protected</TnAttribute>
            <TnAttribute>External</TnAttribute>
            <TnAttribute>Imported</TnAttribute>
        </TnAttributes>
        <MessagingSettings>
            <SmsEnabled>true</SmsEnabled>
        </MessagingSettings>
    </SipPeerTelephoneNumber>
</SipPeerTelephoneNumberResponse>

      <DaTelephoneNumbersCount>0</DaTelephoneNumbersCount>
   </SipPeerTelephoneNumbersCount>
</SipPeerTelephoneNumbersCountResponse>

example.description: The requested resource was not found.

get.description:
Retrieve information about one or more Telephone Numbers (TNs), where the TNs are chosen based on the search parameters provided in the API Call.

In this table are presented capabilities that are not universally available. The following request query parameters are only allowed for numbers from specific region/country:
| Number Region | Request Query Parameter |
|:--------------|:------------------------|
|NANP|city|
|NANP|tier|
|NANP|npaNxx|
|NANP|npaNxxx|
|NANP|lata|
|NANP|state|
|NANP|ratecenter|

When the  query parameters listed in the table above are passed, only in service North American Numbering Plan phone numbers are returned.

parameters.description: The internal account id assigned to the customer that "owns" the TN.
parameters.name: accountId

parameters.description: A E.164 TN.
parameters.name: fullNumber

parameters.description: An IP address or subnet (CIDR format) associated with the TN. Filter for subnet applies by exact match.
parameters.name: host

parameters.description: A service type value to filter the TNs returned in the payload.
parameters.name: service

parameters.description:
The 6-digit prefix associated with the TN.

  • Allowed number ranges for NPA are [2-9] for the first digit and [0-9] for both the second and third digits.
  • Allowed number ranges for NXX are [2-9] for the first digit and [0-9] for both the second and third digits.
parameters.name: npaNxx

parameters.description:
The 7-digit prefix associated with the TN.

  • Allowed number ranges for NPA are [2-9] for the first digit and [0-9] for both the second and third digits.
  • Allowed number ranges for NXXX are [2-9] for the first digit and [0-9] the rest of the (X) digits.
parameters.name: npaNxxx

parameters.description: A Rate Center search filter - all returned TNs will be in the entered Rate Center.  Typically this is a 3 or 5 digit value.
parameters.name: lata

parameters.description: A Rate Center search filter - all returned TNs will be in the entered Rate Center.  This `ratecenter` must be combined with a `state` in the query.  If State is not included in the query then the query will fail.
parameters.name: rateCenter

parameters.description: A State search filter - all returned TNs will be in the entered State.  This is a 2-character State or Province abbreviation.
parameters.name: state

example.value:
<?xml version="1.0" encoding="UTF-8" standalone="yes"?>
<TelephoneNumbersResponse>
    <TelephoneNumberCount>5</TelephoneNumberCount>
    <Links>
        <first>Link=<https://api.bandwidth.com:443/v1.0/tns?account=9500012&page=1&size=500>;rel="first";</first>
        <next>Link=<https://api.bandwidth.com:443/v1.0/tns?account=9500012&page=+12012082912&size=500>;rel="next";</next>
    </Links>
    <TelephoneNumbers>
        <TelephoneNumber>
            <City>CARY</City>
            <Lata>426</Lata>
            <State>NC</State>
            <FullNumber>+19192381138</FullNumber>
            <Tier>0</Tier>
            <VendorId>49</VendorId>
            <VendorName>Bandwidth CLEC</VendorName>
          <RateCenter>CARY</RateCenter>
            <Status>Inservice</Status>
            <AccountId>9900008</AccountId>
            <LastModified>2013-12-05T05:58:27.000Z</LastModified>
            <InServiceDate>2013-12-05T05:58:27.000Z</InServiceDate>
        </TelephoneNumber>
        <TelephoneNumber>
            <City>CARY</City>
            <Lata>426</Lata>
            <State>NC</State>
            <FullNumber>+19192381139</FullNumber>
            <Tier>0</Tier>
            <VendorId>49</VendorId>
            <VendorName>Bandwidth CLEC</VendorName>
            <RateCenter>CARY</RateCenter>
            <Status>Inservice</Status>
            <AccountId>9900000</AccountId>
            <LastModified>2013-12-05T05:58:27.000Z</LastModified>
            <InServiceDate>2013-12-05T05:58:27.000Z</InServiceDate>
        </TelephoneNumber>
        <TelephoneNumber>
            <City>CARY</City>
            <Lata>426</Lata>
            <State>NC</State>
            <FullNumber>+19192381141</FullNumber>
            <Tier>0</Tier>

200.description: The descriptive payload for the TNs query provides information about the TN(s) that were found in the Query. Links to assist in pagination are also provided.

example.value:
<?xml version="1.0" encoding="UTF-8" standalone="yes"?>
<TelephoneNumbersResponse>
    <ResponseStatus>
        <ErrorCode>15511</ErrorCode>
        <Description>The NPA_NXX '9192384' is invalid</Description>
    </ResponseStatus>
</TelephoneNumbersResponse>

post.description:
Retrieve information about one or more Telephone Numbers (TNs), where the TNs are specified in POST body.

In this table are presented capabilities that are not universally available. The following request query parameters are only allowed for numbers from specific region/country:
| Number Region | Request Query Parameter |
|:--------------|:------------------------|
|NANP|city|
|NANP|tier|
|NANP|npaNxx|
|NANP|npaNxxx|
|NANP|lata|
|NANP|state|
|NANP|ratecenter|

When the  query parameters listed in the table above are passed, only in service North American Numbering Plan phone numbers are returned.

parameters.description: A service type value to filter the TNs returned in the payload.
parameters.name: service

errors.description: Telephone Numbers cannot be found on accounts

example.value: 4 https://api.bandwidth.com/api/tns INDIANAPOLIS 336 IN +13172000000 0 49 Bandwidth CLEC INDIANAPLS Available 753 2016-11-16T19:34:22.000Z INDIANAPOLIS 336 IN +13172000500 0 49 Bandwidth CLEC INDIANAPLS Aging 14 2016-11-16T19:34:22.000Z INDIANAPOLIS 336 IN +13172000100 0 49 Bandwidth CLEC INDIANAPLS Available 753 2016-11-16T19:34:22.000Z INDIANAPOLIS 336 IN +13172000207 0 49 Bandwidth CLEC INDIANAPLS Available 753 2016-11-16T19:34:22.000Z INDIANAPOLIS 336 IN +13172000285 0 49 Bandwidth CLEC INDIANAPLS Available 753 2016-11-16T19:34:22.000Z 15608 Input contains invalid Telephone Numbers +111111111111 +199999999999 15610 Telephone Numbers cannot be found on accounts +13172110285 +13172100285

responseStatus.description: The count of Telephone numbers in POST body exceeds the maximum size of 20

example.value:
<?xml version="1.0" encoding="UTF-8" standalone="yes"?>
<TelephoneNumbersResponse>
    <ResponseStatus>
        <ErrorCode>15607</ErrorCode>
        <Description>The count of Telephone numbers in POST body exceeds the maximum size of 2500</Description>
    </ResponseStatus>
</TelephoneNumbersResponse>

get.description: Retrieves the telephone number's information.

example.value:
<?xml version="1.0" encoding="UTF-8" standalone="yes"?>
<TelephoneNumberResponse>
  <TelephoneNumber>+12012035013</TelephoneNumber>
  <Status>Inservice</Status>
  <LastModifiedDate>2014-03-25 12:55:11.0</LastModifiedDate>
  <OrderCreateDate>2014-03-25T12:55:11.810Z</OrderCreateDate>
  <OrderId>cf79d3c3-21b7-4db7-9867-273a1867f934</OrderId>
  <OrderType>NEW_NUMBER_ORDER</OrderType>
  <InServiceDate>2014-03-25T12:55:11.810Z</InServiceDate>
  <SiteId>2409</SiteId>
  <AccountId>8000273</AccountId>
</TelephoneNumberResponse>

example.description: The requested resource was not found.

get.description: Retrieves information about available NnRoutes for the phone number.

example.value:
<?xml version="1.0" encoding="UTF-8" standalone="yes"?>
<AvailableNnRoutes>
  <NNRoute>
    <Nnid>101601</Nnid>
    <Name>USA Mobility</Name>
  </NNRoute>
  <NNRoute>
    <Nnid>102787</Nnid>
    <Name>Globe Wireless - Bandwidth.com - SVR</Name>
  </NNRoute>
</AvailableNnRoutes>

<?xml version="1.0" encoding="UTF-8" standalone="yes"?>
<AvailableNnRoutes>
  <ResponseStatus>
    <ErrorCode>12512</ErrorCode>
    <Description>Telephone number '123456789' is not valid</Description>
  </ResponseStatus>
</AvailableNnRoutes>

get.summary: List NN routes for phone number

get.description: Retrieves the e911 information associated with that telephone number

parameters.description: A 10 Digit TN
parameters.name: tn

example.value:
<?xml version="1.0" encoding="UTF-8" standalone="yes"?>
<TnE911AddressResponse>
   <Address>
      <Name>Test address</Name>
      <City>RALEIGH</City>
      <HouseNumber>900</HouseNumber>
      <StateCode>NC</StateCode>
      <StreetName>MAIN CAMPUS DR</StreetName>
      <Zip>27606</Zip>
      <PlusFour>5214</PlusFour>
   </Address>
   <EmergencyNotificationGroup>
      <Identifier>63865500-0904-46b1-9b4f-7bd237a26363</Identifier>
      <Description>Building 5, 5th Floor.</Description>
   </EmergencyNotificationGroup>
</TnE911AddressResponse>

get.description:
Retrieves detailed information about the phone number.

In this table are presented capabilities that are not universally available. The following response body attributes are only returned for numbers from specific region/country:
| Number Region | Response Body Attributes |
|:--------------|:------------------------|
|NANP|LATA|
|NANP|State|
|NANP|RateCenter|
|NANP|E911|

These parameters are only applicable and hence returned in response body for North American Numbering Plan phone numbers.

Phone Number details with Hosted Voice,.description: Phone Number details with Voice, Hosted messaging and Hosted E911 on different accounts

Shared TN details.value:
<?xml version="1.0" encoding="UTF-8" standalone="yes"?>
<TelephoneNumberResponse>
  <TelephoneNumberDetails>
    <City>JERSEY CITY</City>
    <Lata>224</Lata>
    <State>NJ</State>
    <FullNumber>+12018981023</FullNumber>
    <Tier>0</Tier>
    <VendorId>49</VendorId>
    <VendorName>Bandwidth CLEC</VendorName>
    <RateCenter>JERSEYCITY</RateCenter>
    <Status>Inservice</Status>
    <AccountId>14</AccountId>
    <Site>
      <Id>479</Id>
      <Name>site_9b08f</Name>
    </Site>
    <SipPeer>
      <PeerId>500014</PeerId>
      <PeerName>a2750fad-3</PeerName>
    </SipPeer>
    <ServiceTypes>
      <ServiceType>Voice</ServiceType>
    </ServiceTypes>
    <LastModified>2014-07-30T11:29:37.000Z</LastModified>
    <InServiceDate>2014-07-30T11:29:37.000Z</InServiceDate>
    <Features>
      <E911>
        <AccountId>14</AccountId>
        <LastE911OrderOutcome>SUCCESS</LastE911OrderOutcome>
        <SipPeerAddress>false</SipPeerAddress>
        <CallerName>Test CallerName</CallerName>
        <Address>
          <HouseNumber>901</HouseNumber>
          <StreetName>MAIN CAMPUS</StreetName>
          <StreetSuffix>DR</StreetSuffix>
          <City>RALEIGH</City>
          <StateCode>NC</StateCode>
          <Zip>27606</Zip>
          <PlusFour>5244</PlusFour>
          <Country>United States</Country>
        </Address>
        <EmergencyNotificationGroup>
          <Identifier>625e3ad9-c95e-4148-b2f7-d47a8dbdd0d9</Identifier>
          <Description>Building A</Description>
        </EmergencyNotificationGroup>
      </E911>
      <Lidb>
        <Status>Pending</Status>
        <SubscriberInformation>Fred</SubscriberInformation>
        <UseType>BUSINESS</UseType>
        <Visibility>PUBLIC</Visibility>
      </Lidb>
      <Dlda>
        <Status>Success</Status>
        <SubscriberType>BUSINESS</SubscriberType>
        <ListingType>LISTED</ListingType>
        <ListingName>
          <FirstName>Joe</FirstName>
          <LastName>Smith</LastName>
        </ListingName>
        <ListAddress>true</ListAddress>

example.value:
<?xml version="1.0" encoding="UTF-8" standalone="yes"?>
<TelephoneNumberResponse>
 <ResponseStatus>
 <ErrorCode>12512</ErrorCode>
 <Description>Telephone number '123456789' is not valid</Description>
 </ResponseStatus>
 </TelephoneNumberResponse>

phoneNumberAttributeJson.description: The PhoneNumberAttributes field specifies line attributes that will apply to the ported in telephone numbers. If present, PhoneNumberAttributes may have a value of PROTECTED. This element is not applicable for off-net and toll free port-types.

addressLine2.description: AddressLine2 is used to specify Unit, Suite, Floor, etc. in the Service Address. AddressLine2 is optional when not needed to fully specify the ServiceAddress.

city.description: City is mandatory in cases where the ServiceAddress is mandatory.

country.description: Country is the country of the ServiceAddress. This value will be derived from the StateCode, so it should generally be omitted.

county.description: The county where the subscriber or business is located.

houseNumber.description: The HouseNumber is the street address number of the ServiceAddress. HouseNumber is mandatory for port-in orders in which the ServiceAddress is mandatory.

housePrefix.description: The HousePrefix is the non-numeric address number prefix of the ServiceAddress. This element is optional when not needed to fully specify the ServiceAddress.

houseSuffix.description: The HouseSuffix is the non-numeric address number suffix of the ServiceAddress. This element is optional when not needed to fully specify the ServiceAddress.

plusFour.description: PlusFour is the 4 digits that are sometimes suffixed to the Zip Code.

postDirectional.description: The PostDirectional is the street name post directional of the ServiceAddress. This element is optional when not needed to fully specify the ServiceAddress.

preDirectional.description: The PreDirectional is the non-numeric street name prefix of the ServiceAddress. This element is optional when not needed to fully specify the ServiceAddress.

stateCode.description: StateCode is the 2-letter abbreviation of the state of the ServiceAddress. StateCode is mandatory in cases where the ServiceAddress is mandatory.

streetName.description: The StreetName is mandatory in cases where the ServiceAddress is mandatory.

streetSuffix.description: The StreetSuffix is the street suffix of the ServiceAddress. This element is optional when not needed to fully specify the ServiceAddress.

zip.description: Zip is the Zip Code of the ServiceAddress. Zip is mandatory in cases where the ServiceAddress is mandatory.

Count.description: Total count of telephone numbers associated with the specified port-in number.

originationRoutePlanJson.description: The OriginationRoutePlan element consists of an action and a list of prioritized and weighted routes that tell Bandwidth where to send phone calls to phone numbers associated with the route plan.

AddressLine2.description: AddressLine2 is used to specify Unit, Suite, Floor, etc. in the Service Address. AddressLine2 is optional when not needed to fully specify the ServiceAddress.

City.description: City is mandatory in cases where the ServiceAddress is mandatory.

Country.description: Country is the country of the ServiceAddress. This value will be derived from the StateCode, so it should generally be omitted.

County.description: The county where the subscriber or business is located.

HouseNumber.description: The HouseNumber is the street address number of the ServiceAddress. HouseNumber is mandatory for port-in orders in which the ServiceAddress is mandatory.

HousePrefix.description: The HousePrefix is the non-numeric address number prefix of the ServiceAddress. This element is optional when not needed to fully specify the ServiceAddress.

HouseSuffix.description: The HouseSuffix is the non-numeric address number suffix of the ServiceAddress. This element is optional when not needed to fully specify the ServiceAddress.

PlusFour.description: PlusFour is the 4 digits that are sometimes suffixed to the Zip Code.

PostDirectional.description: The PostDirectional is the street name post directional of the ServiceAddress. This element is optional when not needed to fully specify the ServiceAddress.

PreDirectional.description: The PreDirectional is the non-numeric street name prefix of the ServiceAddress. This element is optional when not needed to fully specify the ServiceAddress.

StateCode.description: StateCode is the 2-letter abbreviation of the state of the ServiceAddress. StateCode is mandatory in cases where the ServiceAddress is mandatory.

StreetName.description: The StreetName is mandatory in cases where the ServiceAddress is mandatory.

StreetSuffix.description: The StreetSuffix is the street suffix of the ServiceAddress. This element is optional when not needed to fully specify the ServiceAddress.

Zip.description: Zip is the Zip Code of the ServiceAddress. Zip is mandatory in cases where the ServiceAddress is mandatory.

originationRoutePlan.description: The OriginationRoutePlan element consists of an action and a list of prioritized and weighted routes that tell Bandwidth where to send phone calls to phone numbers associated with the route plan.

Endpoint.description: Must be one of the following: - a NANP 10-digit telephone number - a SIP URI - an IPv4 address - a Fully Qualified Domain Name (FQDN)

Name.description: A friendly name for a route.  This is not used for any back-end call routing.

CnamCount.description: Telephone numbers count with activated CNAM on provided sipPeer

LidbCount.description: Telephone numbers count with activated Lidb on provided sipPeer

SipPeerTelephoneNumbersCount.description: Telephone numbers count on provided sipPeer

endpoint.description: Must be one of the following: - a NANP 10 digit telephone number, or - a SIP URI, or - a IPv4 address, or - a Fully Qualified Domain name(FQDN)

name.description: A friendly name for a route.  This is not used for any back-end call routing.

phoneNumbersJson.description: An array of phone numbers, formatted as E164 phone numbers with no dots or dashes. At least one phone number must be provided.

items.description: One or more phone numbers is required.

CallForward.description: Does this telephone number have call forwarding or not

CallingNameDisplay.description: Calling Name of the caller is available to the user or not on incoming calls

MessagingSettings.description: Does this telephone number have any messaging system configured

TnAttributes.description: Is this telephone number protected or not

countryCodeA3Json.description: Country code of the address in ISO 3166-1 alpha-3 format.
countryCodeA3Json.title: Country Code

Count.description: Total count of telephone numbers associated with the specified port-in number.

TelephoneNumber.description: ListOfPhoneNumbers is an array of PhoneNumber. At least one PhoneNumber must be provided for all port-types.

totalCount.description: Total number of phone numbers matching the criteria.

subAccountPhoneNumberCountResponse.description: Total count of phone numbers in a sub-account.

totalCount.description: Total number of phone numbers in the sub-account.

smsEnabled.description: Whether SMS is enabled for this phone number.

locationPhoneNumberItem.description: Phone number details on a location (SIP peer).

phoneNumberAttributes.description: Attributes associated with the phone number.

locationPhoneNumbersResponse.description: Paginated list of phone numbers on a location (SIP peer).

locationPhoneNumbersCountResponse.description: Count of phone numbers on a location, broken down by feature.

totalCount.description: Total phone numbers on the location.

phoneNumberStatusResponse.description: Status and metadata for a single phone number.

status.description: Lifecycle status of the phone number.

subAccountId.description: ID of the sub-account (site) that owns this number.

accountId.description: ID of the account that owns this number.

availableNnRoutesResponse.description: Available NN routes for a phone number.

tnE911Response.description: E911 address associated with a phone number.

tnLataResponse.description: LATA associated with a phone number.

lata.description: Local Access and Transport Area code.

tnLcaResponse.description: Local Calling Area information for a phone number.

npaNxx.description: NPA-NXX codes in the local calling area.

tnRateCenterResponse.description: Rate center information for a phone number.

tnLocationResponse.description: Location (SIP peer) associated with a phone number.

tnSubAccountResponse.description: Sub-account (site) associated with a phone number.

tnHistoryResponse.description: History of status changes for a phone number.

endDateQueryParam.description: The ending date of a search in yy-mm-dd format. startdate and enddate must be used as a pair.
endDateQueryParam.name: endDate

phoneNumberTypeQueryParam.description: The type of phone number. The system defaults to return phone numbers of all types when the query parameter is not passed. The countryCodeA3 is a required parameter with phone number type.
phoneNumberTypeQueryParam.name: phoneNumberType

tierQueryParam.description: A service tier indicating the the vendor class that the TN is associated with.  Tier indicates whether the TN is on-net, domestic offnet, Canadian, etc.
tierQueryParam.name: tier

cityQueryParam.description: The name of the city. The system defaults to return all cities when the query parameter is not passed. The countryCodeA3 is a required parameter with city. Some phone number types like TOLL_FREE may not have any associated cities.
cityQueryParam.name: city

areaCodeQueryParam.description: The 1 to 6 digit area code associated with the phone number. The system defaults to return all area codes when the query parameter is not passed. The countryCodeA3 is a required parameter with areaCode.
areaCodeQueryParam.name: areaCode

countryCodeA3QueryParam.description: Country code of the address in ISO 3166-1 alpha-3 format.
countryCodeA3QueryParam.name: countryCodeA3

pageQueryParam.description: An ID of the first element in a page.  This value will indicate the first value, not the page number, of the initial entry in the page being requested. The initial page is tagged with the ID `1` as a convention.
pageQueryParam.name: page

SiteIdPathParam.description: Site ID, also known as Sub-Account
SiteIdPathParam.name: siteId

sizeQueryParam.description: The number of elements to retrieve
sizeQueryParam.name: size

SipPeerTnsPageQueryParam.description: The number of the paged results to be displayed.
SipPeerTnsPageQueryParam.name: page

SipPeerTnsSizeQueryParam.description: The quantity of results displayed for each page.
SipPeerTnsSizeQueryParam.name: size

startDateQueryParam.description: The starting date of a search in yy-mm-dd format. startdate and enddate must be used as a pair.
startDateQueryParam.name: startDate
